summary: Add go-auto handoff emitter for Hermes/Bertus
description: Add a machine-readable --emit-handoff mode so go auto can produce a bounded Hermes/Bertus execution handoff with task ids, scope, gates, expected evidence, and run envelope.
acceptance: go auto --emit-handoff returns JSON with schema, target repo, command, tasks, scope, gates, expected evidence, and run envelope
go-loop --emit-handoff uses go-loop mode and preserves the same handoff contract

evidence.summary: Implemented go auto/go-loop --emit-handoff with go-workflow.agent-handoff.v1 including repo, mode, target runtime, tasks, scope, gates, expected evidence, execution_policy, and run_envelope. Verified pytest -q, make check, and go-project-template make check.
